name: Thabo Mokoena
message: Hi, we need to reorder 5 HP 58A toner cartridges for our office printers. Please send a quote.

name: Naledi Khumalo
message: We are looking for a bulk deal on A4 paper (100+ reams) and toner cartridges. Please provide corporate pricing.

name: Dr. Pieter van Wyk
message: We are interested in a maintenance contract for our HP LaserJet printers. Please call to discuss options.

name: Sipho Ndlovu
message: Please process our monthly order: 10 reams A4 paper, 3 HP 63XL ink cartridges, 2 boxes of pens.

name: Amahle Dlamini
message: We need pricing for 5 new HP OfficeJet Pro printers for our new office space opening in April.

name: Lerato Molefe
message: Do you deliver to Cape Town? We are looking for a reliable office supply partner in Johannesburg.
